Add location-anchored comparator text for Athey-Imbens 2006, Callaway-Li 2019, Li-Lin 2024, Callaway-Li-Oka 2018, and Fan-Yu 2012, then ensure every cited bibkey appears in §13.

Fix the misidentified Distribution Regression DID citation: either cite Fernández-Val, Meier, van Vuuren, and Vella 2024 for distribution-regression DID, or drop the ChernozhukovFernandezValLuo2024 bibkey.
